title: I Believe in You
writer: Sewell Stokes, Jack Whittingham, Michael Relph
actors: Cecil Parker, Celia Johnson, Harry Fowler
plot: When a retired colonial serviceman takes a job as a probation officer he finds it a challenge. He and his colleague attempt to reform a hardened criminal and a juvenile delinquent from the London slums.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
